buildCommand: cd frontend/o && npm install && npm run build

headers.value: default-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' blob: data: https: wss:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' blob: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https:; img-src 'self' https: data: blob:; font-src 'self' data: https:; connect-src 'self' https: wss: http: localhost:*;
GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, PATCH
